name: Fresh Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Butter and lightly flour a 9-inch square cake pan.
3. Cream the butter until light in color.
4. Gradually add the sugar, beating continuously until fully incorporated.
5. Add the mashed bananas, eggs, and vanilla extract. Beat well until all ingredients are combined.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together the cake flour, baking soda, and salt.
7. Gradually blend the dry ingredients into the butter mixture until just combined.
8. Slowly add the sour cream, mixing until smooth.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for about 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing it from the pan onto a wire rack.
